XOnlineSignatureVerify

Creates an asynchronous task to submit Xbox Live signature and digest pairs to the signature service for verification.

HRESULT XOnlineSignatureVerify(
    const XONLINE_SIGNATURE_TO_VERIFY *rgSignaturesToVerify,
    DWORD dwSignaturesToVerify,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE phTask
);

Parameters

rgSignaturesToVerify
[in] Array of XONLINE_SIGNATURE_TO_VERIFY structures containing the digest/signature pairs to verify.
dwSignaturesToVerify
[in] Number of arrays contained in rgSignaturesToVerify.
hWorkEvent
[in, optional] Handle to an event that will be signaled when there is work to be done on the verification task. This parameter can be NULL if no such event is required.
phTask
[out] Pointer to a variable of type XONLINETASK_HANDLE that receives a task handle representing this verification request. The handle can then be used in calls to XOnlineTaskContinue to perform work associated with this task.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise.

Remarks

Data written to storage is potentially vulnerable to attack or modification. Before using such data or uploading it to the Xbox Live service, titles must call XOnlineSignatureVerify to verify the data with the signature service. The data must have been signed with an Xbox Live signature at the time it was written to storage.

To verify data:

  1. Load the data and the Xbox Live signature previously computed and associated with the data.
  2. Use XCalculateSignatureBegin with XCALCSIG_FLAG_DIGEST to calculate a digest over the data.
  3. Fill the XONLINE_SIGNATURE_TO_VERIFY structure with the digest and signature.
  4. Call XOnlineSignatureVerify to create an asynchronous online task to verify the data.
  5. Call XOnlineTaskContinue until it returns a value other than XONLINETASK_S_RUNNING.
  6. Call XOnlineSignatureVerifyGetResults to retrieve the verification results.
  7. Examine the returned prgHresults array to determine the results for each digest/signature pair.
  8. Call XOnlineTaskClose with the verify task handle to close the task and free associated resources.

To use XOnlineSignatureVerify, the title must be currently logged onto the Xbox Live service, and the XONLINE_SIGNATURE_SERVICE service ID must have been specified when the title called XOnlineLogon (and a connection to the signature service successfully completed).

For more information, see Xbox Live Signatures.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonlines.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Structures, Xbox Live Signatures | XOnlineSignatureVerifyGetResults, XCalculateSignatureBegin, XCalculateSignatureEnd
